name: Corry Bliss
subject: 161,492 voters!
body:
| Peter \--

_**161,492**_ — that's how many voters we contacted today on our Super Saturday day of grassroots action! Thanks to the support of nearly 2,000 volunteers and interns, we blew past our goal of contacting 150,000 voters in a single day.

Jane and Rob made stops across Ohio today meeting with volunteers and interns in Columbus, Toledo, Dayton, West Chester, Terrace Park, Brecksville, Akron, Canton, and Athens.

Thanks to our team's incredible effort today, we are very close to surpassing our goal of contacting 5 million targeted voters over the course of this campaign.

In the race for United States Senate, Ohio voters have a clear choice between moving forward with Rob's pro-growth policies for better wages and more jobs, or returning to Ted Strickland's failed policies of higher taxes, more regulations, and bigger government. Rob has a record of getting results for Ohio and that's why Rob has been endorsed by 12 out of 13 newspapers from across Ohio, including four that previously endorsed Ted.

We're making 80 stops across 4,000 miles on our "Countdown to Victory" RV Tour, so we hope to see you soon before Election Day!

Thanks,

Corry Bliss [](https://www.robportman.com/donate?e=aa4131f163f0a23ba616fd24e19c0e92&utm_source=robportman&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=ss_oct_2&n=1 "Donate here!") [](https://www.robportman.com/r?u=https%3A%2F%2Fwww.facebook.com%2Frobportman&e=aa4131f163f0a23ba616fd24e19c0e92&utm_source=robportman&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=ss_oct_2&n=2)[](https://www.robportman.com/r?u=https%3A%2F%2Ftwitter.com%2Frobportman&e=aa4131f163f0a23ba616fd24e19c0e92&utm_source=robportman&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=ss_oct_2&n=3)

This is the most important election for West Virginia in recent memory. So we are making a list of donors who generously contribute to the campaign to show Bill that we have the momentum.

Tomorrow is the last fundraising deadline before the election, and we want to give you the opportunity to have your name added to the list that we give to bill. You can make sure he sees your name by contributing right now!

I hope that you'll consider contributing today, Friend

disclaimer_text: Paid for by Trump Make America Great Again Committee, a joint fundraising committee authorized by and composed of Donald J
body:
The reason I am running for President is the same reason that you love America as much as I do. |

Friend, The reason I am running for President is the same reason that you love America as much as I do. It’s the passion we feel for wanting to make our country great again. We’re tired of illegal immigrants stealing our jobs and pouring over an unsecure border. We’re tired of professional politicians like Crooked Hillary who cover up lies that place Americans in danger. We’re tired of these horrible trade deals and foreign countries giving the American worker a raw deal. Well Friend, this election can change that. With your support of $35, $50 or $100, we can make the change this country desperately needs. After so many years of building and running successful businesses, I know exactly what it takes to turn this country around: We’re going to build the wall (finally!) and Mexico will pay for it; We’re going to destroy ISIS and renew America’s fight against radical Islamic terrorism; We’re going to rip up the bad trade deals that are hurting American workers; We’re going to fix our VA and honor our American heroes properly with good care and no wait times. And that’s just to start, Friend. There’s a lot more I’m going to do, but I can only do it with your help. Without your support, Crooked Hillary will win this election and America will continue to get more politics as usual for the next 4 years. You cannot let that happen Friend, donate $35, $50 or $100, right now to make sure I win and turn this country around. Thank you, Donald J. Trump CONTRIBUTE $100

name: Elizabeth Warren
subject: what I’m watching for in Pennsylvania
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Katie McGinty for Senate
body:
[](https://act.myngp.com/el/26022287723462656/-8923293323402149888?refcode=e20161023.3&refcode2=e20161023.3nd&amount=25)
---
Friends --

The fate of the Senate hangs in the balance, and may all hinge on Pennsylvania. I'm writing you because we need to make sure our friend Katie McGinty wins this race.

I'll be honest: It won't be easy -- every poll shows __the Pennsylvania Senate race is too close to call__. All the biggest GOP leaders -- from Mitch McConnell to Ted Cruz -- are jumping in to help to raise even more money for Senator Toomey's campaign war chest.

[**Please, can you pitch in $5, or whatever you can, to help Katie win and take back the Senate? Katie 's campaign is in a full sprint to the finish, but she can't do it without you >>**](https://act.myngp.com/el/26022287723462656/-8923293323402149888?refcode=e20161023.3&refcode2=e20161023.3nd&amount=25)

Look, it matters that Katie McGinty joins us in the Senate - but it also matters that Pat Toomey _doesn 't_ stay in the Senate.

Republican Pat Toomey is the "Wall Street Senator" himself. Earlier this month, _Politico_ revealed that Pat Toomey even owned more than half a million dollars in stock in a bank that engaged in predatory practices to foreclose homes -- and then used his own position on the Senate banking committee to push legislation to weaken financial regulation and boost the bottom line of banks like his.

That's a conflict of interest, if I've ever seen one. A very serious one.

We've seen what happens when the banks get a free pass. Barely a month ago, Wells Fargo got caught scamming its own customers with more than 2 million fake accounts. No surprise, Pat Toomey tried repeatedly to undermine the Consumer Financial Protection Bureau that caught Wells Fargo red-handed.

Pennsylvania's working families deserve better. I know Katie McGinty has the principles and grit to take on the tough fights and win. I know she will stand with us -- and she will be a progressive ally in the Senate to fix the broken system.

[**But that all depends on the outcome of this neck-and-neck race. We need to fight hard, take back the Senate, and make sure Katie wins in Pennsylvania >>**](https://act.myngp.com/el/26022287723462656/-8923293323402149888?refcode=e20161023.3&refcode2=e20161023.3nd&amount=25)

**[Quick, donate now->](https://act.myngp.com/el/26022287723462656/-8923293323402149888?refcode=e20161023.3&refcode2=e20161023.3nd&amount=25)**
Only 16 days left to win --

Elizabeth

| *** A note on donations ***

There are only 16 days left in this race, and the polls are in a virtual tie. Katie is fighting for working families in PA -- but we're up against major special interest spending. Can you make a grassroots donation today to help Katie win this race and take back the Senate?
**Chip in $5 today. Thank you.**

**[Donate Now](https://act.myngp.com/el/26022287723462656/-8923293323402149888?refcode=e20161023.3&refcode2=e20161023.3nd&amount=25)**

| It's been a hard year. A certain Republican presidential candidate has taken our political discourse to new lows. Our country's gun violence crisis continues unabated, and Congress continues to do the unthinkable in response: nothing at all.

But I've never been more hopeful.

Because if we can elect candidates like Deborah Ross who are willing to put our interests ahead of the gun lobby's, I know that we can enact commonsense changes to our gun laws. And that's important, because those changes mean saving lives.

[_**I 'm pulling for Deborah, but she needs all of us pulling together. Her race is tied with only a few weeks to go, and a strong grassroots response can put her over the top. Can I count on you to donate $5 to her campaign today?**_](https://secure.deborahross.com/page/m/45f427c5/2cc31c44/5685ddc/19f997af/3412896220/VEsH/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/dre161023?refcode=dre161023_m&recur_weekly=true&amount=5")

Deborah stands with the 92% of Americans who support responsible changes to our gun laws. She wants people who buy guns online to go through background checks. She wants to stop known and suspected terrorists and violent criminals from buying deadly weapons.

**At the beginning of Deborah 's campaign, a lot of people thought she didn't stand a chance.** Now the race is tied. And if we stand together, right now, she's going to win.

[**_Let 's make sure Deborah has all the resources she needs to win. Please give $5 or $10 today._**](https://secure.deborahross.com/page/m/45f427c5/2cc31c44/5685ddc/19f997af/3412896220/VEsE/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/dre161023?refcode=dre161023_m&recur_weekly=true&amount=5")

Gabby |

subject: each of us has a choice
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Steve Bullock - Democrat, P
body:
---
Friend,

When running for office, each of us has a choice as to how to conduct our campaigns. My opponent has chosen to spend his millions on blatant fear-mongering and baseless attacks.

**[Please help us fight back and donate $15.](http://salsa4.salsalabs.com/dia/track.jsp?v=2&c=UNGchjWXjeNKlmanzboH6J%2BV%2Bek%2Fa1po)**

He's banking on being able to spend enough money that what this race is really about -- protecting public access, good public schools, equal pay for women, fair tax policy, fiscal responsibility and economic growth -- gets lost in the shuffle.

I don't think this is the way elections should work. Montana shouldn't be for sale. But Greg Gianforte has now spent $5 million just on commercials -- and public polling has this race extremely close.

Thanks for your continued support. [**Will you pitch in $15 today?**](http://salsa4.salsalabs.com/dia/track.jsp?v=2&c=c5vaNu7dbUe367BEi7%2BBYJ%2BV%2Bek%2Fa1po)

In appreciation,

Steve Bullock ****
